case_title: CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE, INC. A CALIF. CORP. VS. JEROME FEINSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE, INC. A CALIF. CORP. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE, INC. A CALIF. CORP. ON DEFENDANT FEINSTEIN, JEROME
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION SHARON HOUSLEY FILED RE: COMPUTATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE, INC. A CALIF. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEINSTEIN, JEROME $395.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.86 INTEREST, $152.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $609.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
